allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('success:', d.get\('success'\)\); print\('total mlrd:', d.get\('total'\)\); print\('totalCustomers:', d.get\('totalCustomers'\)\); [print\(f\\"  {x['name']}: {x['count']} tender, {x.get\('totalSumMlrd',0\):.0f} mlrd\\"\) for x in d.get\('data',[]\)]")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('/dev/stdin'\); process.stdin.resume\(\); let s=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>s+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const d=JSON.parse\(s\); console.log\('success:',d.success,'total:',d.total,'customers:',d.totalCustomers\); d.data && d.data.forEach\(x=>console.log\(' ',x.name,x.count,'tender'\)\);}\);")
